channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tennessee Republicans to consider redrawing congressional district in Memphis
U.S.-Iran ceasefire faces test amid naval tensions
item.description: A ceasefire with Iran appears to be holding, following a recent naval encounter and renewed attacks in the UAE.

item.title: Coast Guard seeks information about sailboat in Lynette Hooker probe
item.description: The U.S. Coast Guard is seeking information about a sailboat potentially moored near Lynette Hooker’s vessel prior to her disappearance.

item.title: Restaurants mark Cinco de Mayo with Mexican cultural celebrations
